'''shanate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:junctionally|junctionally]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-n-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:junctionally|junctionally]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shanate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:shanate|shanate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shanatesher|shanatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanatesherĂ«m|shanatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shanatero|shanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanateshĂ«|shanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanateshĂ«m|shanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishanatero|gokishanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanateshĂ«|gokishanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanateshĂ«m|gokishanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshanankerom|goshanankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanankeshĂ«|goshanankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanankeshĂ«m|goshanankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshanankeya|goshanankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shanaterom|shanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanatemu|shanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shanateya|shanateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishanaterom|gokishanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanatemu|gokishanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishanateya|gokishanateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:shananate|shananate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shananatesher|shananatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shananatesherĂ«m|shananatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shananatero|shananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shananateshĂ«|shananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shananateshĂ«m|shananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishananatero|gokishananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishananateshĂ«|gokishananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishananateshĂ«m|gokishananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshananankerom|goshananankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshananankeshĂ«|goshananankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshananankeshĂ«m|goshananankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshananankeya|goshananankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shananaterom|shananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shananatemu|shananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shananateya|shananateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishananaterom|gokishananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishananatemu|gokishananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishananateya|gokishananateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:shĂŠnĂŠte|shĂŠnĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shĂŠnĂŠtesher|shĂŠnĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m|shĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠnĂŠtero|shĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|shĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|shĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠnĂŠtero|gokishĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|gokishĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|gokishĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshĂŠnĂŠnkerom|goshĂŠnĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«|goshĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goshĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshĂŠnĂŠnkeya|goshĂŠnĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠnĂŠterom|shĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠnĂŠtemu|shĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shĂŠnĂŠteya|shĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠnĂŠterom|gokishĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠnĂŠtemu|gokishĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishĂŠnĂŠteya|gokishĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:shafnafte|shafnafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shafnaftesher|shafnaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafnaftesherĂ«m|shafnaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafnaftero|shafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafnafteshĂ«|shafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafnafteshĂ«m|shafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafnaftero|gokishafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafnafteshĂ«|gokishafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafnafteshĂ«m|gokishafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshafnafnkerom|goshafnafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafnafnkeshĂ«|goshafnafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafnafnkeshĂ«m|goshafnafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshafnafnkeya|goshafnafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafnafterom|shafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafnaftemu|shafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shafnafteya|shafnafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafnafterom|gokishafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafnaftemu|gokishafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishafnafteya|gokishafnafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
